hero.title: Professional move-out cleaning
hero.subtitle: Let our experienced team handle the cleaning
hero.description: We guarantee a thorough move-out cleaning that meets all requirements. Our professional cleaning service ensures your old home is left in perfect condition.

content.whatIsDescription: Move-out cleaning is a thorough cleaning of a home that is to be left during a move. It is an important part of the moving process that ensures the old home is left in perfect condition for the next tenant. A professional move-out cleaning includes everything from thorough cleaning of all surfaces to special treatment of kitchen and bathroom. We follow industry standards and ensure that the cleaning meets all requirements set by landlords or buyers. With our experience and thoroughness, you can feel confident that your old home is left in sparkling condition.
content.pricingDescription: The price of move-out cleaning varies depending on the home's size, number of rooms, condition and any additional services. A normal move-out cleaning for an apartment can cost from around 1,400 SEK after RUT deduction and upwards. To get an exact price, we recommend that you request a free quote tailored to your specific needs and the home's conditions.
content.pricingTestimonial: Flyttella fixed the move-out cleaning and it turned out really well. The apartment was clean and fresh and the inspection went without problems. Can be recommended.
content.includesTitle: What is included in move-out cleaning?
content.includesDescription: A complete move-out cleaning includes thorough cleaning of all rooms, kitchen and bathroom. We clean all surfaces, polish windows, vacuum and mop floors, clean appliances and sanitary equipment. We use professional cleaning products and follow industry standards to ensure the highest quality. Our move-out cleaning also includes special treatment of kitchen and bathroom, including cleaning of refrigerator/freezer, stove, oven and all sanitary equipment. We also offer additional services such as cleaning of balcony, garage or storage room when needed.
content.guaranteeDescription: We are so confident in our quality that we offer a 14-day customer satisfaction guarantee on all move-out cleanings. This means that if you are not completely satisfied with the cleaning, we will come back and fix it at no extra cost. Our guarantee gives you security and ensures that you get exactly the quality you expect. We value your satisfaction and work hard to deliver a move-out cleaning that exceeds your expectations.
checklistItems: Turn off and defrost refrigerator and freezer: Do this at least one day before cleaning for best results.
Clean drains: Remove any blockages to facilitate cleaning.
Pull out appliances: If you want us to clean behind refrigerator, freezer, stove or washing machine.
Empty all rooms: Make sure all rooms are empty of furniture and personal belongings.
Leave keys: Make sure we have access to the home on cleaning day.
Communicate special requirements: Inform us of any special needs or sensitive surfaces.

about.title: About Flyttella
about.description1: Flyttella is one of Stockholm's leading players in move-out cleaning with over 8 years of experience in professional move-out cleaning, home cleaning and office cleaning. We always offer 14-day cleaning guarantee, fixed prices and personal service for all move-out cleanings in Stockholm.
about.description2: We know all Stockholm areas and adapt our move-out cleaning services to your specific needs - from apartments and villas to offices and shops. Our move-out cleaning follows industry standards and ensures that your old home is left in perfect condition.
about.description3: Our goal is to make your move-out cleaning as simple and secure as possible. We offer free quote, quick booking and personal contact throughout the move-out cleaning process. With our experience of move-out cleaning in Stockholm, you can feel secure.

questions.question: How do I best prepare for move-out cleaning?
questions.answer: Start by clearing out everything you no longer need. Remove all personal items and loose property. Make sure all surfaces are accessible for cleaning. Inform us of any special requirements from the landlord or buyer, and book cleaning well in advance to ensure availability.

questions.question: What is usually included in a move-out cleaning?
questions.answer: A thorough move-out cleaning includes cleaning of all surfaces, floors, walls, ceilings, windows, kitchen, bathroom and toilets. We also clean appliances, cabinets, drawers and all hard surfaces. The cleaning follows industry standards and ensures that the home is left in perfect condition according to common requirements.

questions.question: How does the cleaning guarantee work?
questions.answer: Our 14-day cleaning guarantee means that if the landlord or buyer is not satisfied with the cleaning, we will come back and fix any deficiencies at no extra cost. This gives you security and ensures that you get the quality you pay for.

questions.question: How long does move-out cleaning take and what affects the time required?
questions.answer: The time required depends on several factors: the home's size, number of rooms, condition, accessibility and any special requirements. A normal apartment usually takes a few hours, while larger villas can take a full day or more. We always give you a realistic time estimate before we start.

questions.question: Can you adapt the cleaning to specific requirements?
questions.answer: Yes, we can adapt the cleaning to your specific needs and any requirements from the landlord or buyer. We have experience with different cleaning requirements and can ensure that the cleaning meets all expectations. Contact us to discuss your specific needs.

hero.subtitle: Keep your home clean and fresh with our reliable home cleaning
hero.description: We offer regular home cleaning for homes in Stockholm. With our experience and thoroughness, we ensure a sparkling clean result every time.

content.whatIsDescription: Home cleaning is regular or recurring cleaning of your home. We adapt the cleaning to your needs and wishes – from kitchen and bathroom to living room and bedroom. Our experienced team uses eco-friendly products and ensures a sparkling clean result every time. With home cleaning from a professional cleaning company, you get high, consistent quality and more time for what's important. We work according to a clear checklist and offer flexible intervals (weekly, bi-weekly or monthly) as well as options such as window cleaning and deep cleaning. Everything to make your home cleaning in Stockholm simple, safe and affordable.
content.pricingDescription: Price for home cleaning depends on living area, layout, cleaning frequency and your specific wishes. With 50% RUT deduction on labor costs, recurring home cleaning becomes very cost-effective. Request a free quote quickly and easily. Factors that affect the price include degree of soiling and any options (e.g. window cleaning or oven cleaning). We always provide a fixed, transparent price without hidden fees so you know exactly what your home cleaning costs.
content.pricingTestimonial: Like coming home to a completely new home every time – professional, reliable and affordable!
content.includesTitle: What is included in home cleaning?
content.includesDescription: Home cleaning includes vacuuming and mopping all floors, dusting free surfaces, wiping baseboards, doors and handles, mirrors and visible surfaces. In the kitchen, countertops, stovetop, sink and exterior of appliances are cleaned, and in the bathroom, sink, shower/bathtub and toilet are descaled and cleaned. Trash cans are emptied and surfaces are tidied up. As an option, you can add window cleaning, bed linen change, internal cabinet cleaning, oven tray/oven and deep cleaning. We use eco-friendly products and work according to a clear checklist for a consistent and sparkling result.
content.howToBookTitle: How do I book home cleaning?
content.howToBookDescription: Book directly by filling out the form, get a price quote quickly and easily and confirm digitally. We contact you the same day or the next business day to confirm living area, frequency and any options. Then we plan the start date – simple and safe. We match you with a fixed cleaner or a small team for continuity and security. You choose the day of the week and time that suits you, and can easily adjust or pause via our customer service. Payment is made smoothly after completed cleaning. The RUT deduction (50% on labor costs) is handled automatically by us.

hero.title: International Moving from Stockholm
hero.subtitle: International moving – secure planning, packing and transport
hero.description: We help you through the entire move – from planning and preparation to secure handling and delivery. Our goal is to make the process simple, safe and smooth for you. Fill out the form and get a quote in just one minute.

content.whatIsDescription: International moving is the relocation of household goods across a national border, often between different regulations and languages. Compared to domestic moving, it requires longer lead times, more documentation and consideration of customs and import rules, insurance conditions, road and border controls as well as time differences and holidays in several countries. Typical steps include cleaning and inventory of household goods, long-distance adapted packing, creation of inventory lists and customs values, planning of routes and delivery windows as well as receiving control at the destination. Lead times are usually longer than for domestic moving and it is wise to plan with buffer for border crossings and unforeseen events.
content.pricingDescription: The price depends mainly on volume (cubic), destination, accessibility at the addresses (floor, elevator, carrying distance) and options such as packing, storage and assembly/disassembly. Distance, bridge and road fees as well as desired delivery windows also affect the total price. Pricing is usually done as a fixed price or variable price. Fixed price means a total sum for a clearly defined scope (volume, addresses, carrying distance, time windows) and does not change as long as the conditions match – predictable and easy to budget. Variable price is charged per time/volume or according to running billing based on actual effort and possible additions – flexible with uncertain scope, but the final cost may vary. In both cases, the price may include materials, working time, transport, insurance and sometimes customs-related costs. The cost can often be reduced by reducing the volume (cleaning), being flexible with dates and ensuring good accessibility/parking.
content.pricingTestimonial: Safe and smooth international move – Flyttella had clear communication all the way.
content.includesTitle: What is included in international moving?
content.includesDescription: Inventory and planning, loading with furniture protection, insurance, international road transport and unloading at destination. We coordinate carrying distance and delivery windows and do a simple receiving control. Options: packing of the entire home, storage, assembly/disassembly and moving cleaning before handover.
content.bookingTitle: How do I book international moving?
content.bookingDescription: Book via the form – specify address, volume and destination. You get a price directly and can confirm digitally. We contact you the same day or next business day to coordinate details, desired dates and any options. We offer package solutions for the best price.
checklistItems: Book moving company in good time: Ensure you get the date that suits you best.
Clean and sort: Go through your things and throw away, sell or donate what you don't need.
Order moving boxes: Borrow or buy enough boxes and packing materials.
Pack smart: Mark boxes with content and room. Pack heavy things in small boxes and light things in large ones. We also offer packing help as an option - contact us for more information.
Change address and notify important contacts: Report move to Tax Agency, insurance company, bank, electricity company and other suppliers.
Book moving cleaning: Make sure the home is properly cleaned before handover.
Take down curtains, lamps and shelves: Prepare as much as possible before moving day.
Pack a "first night box": Put in the most important: clothes, toiletries, chargers and important papers.
Double check everything on moving day: Check that nothing is left, that all windows and doors are locked and that keys are left according to agreement.
Passport, visa and residence permit: Ensure validity and right certificates for everyone in the household.
Inventory list and customs values: List household goods and prepare customs values according to destination country's requirements.
Import rules: Check what can be brought in (e.g. food, plants, batteries) and if permits are required.
International insurance: Make sure the insurance covers long-distance road transport and the entire moving chain.
Parking and carrying distance: Arrange loading zone/permit and elevator booking at both addresses.
Pets: Check veterinary certificates, vaccinations and import requirements.

questions.question: How do I best prepare for assembly?
questions.answer: Start by clearing the area where the assembly should take place. Make sure all parts and instructions are available. Check that there is enough space to work. If you have special wishes or preferences, write them down so we can follow them.

questions.question: What is usually included in an assembly?
questions.answer: An assembly usually includes assembly of furniture, installation of hardware and possible adjustment. We follow the instructions carefully and make sure everything is secure and works as it should. We can also offer additional services such as moving furniture or cleaning.

questions.question: How does quality control work for assembly?
questions.answer: We check every step in the assembly process to ensure everything is correctly assembled. We test functionality and adjust if needed. We document all work and give you a walkthrough of the finished result.

questions.question: How long does an assembly take and what affects the time?
questions.answer: The time depends on several factors: the complexity of the furniture, the number of furniture, accessibility to the area and any special requirements. A normal assembly usually takes a few hours, but larger projects can take a whole day.

questions.question: Can you handle all types of assembly tasks?
questions.answer: We handle most types of assembly tasks including IKEA furniture, kitchen fittings, wardrobes and special furniture. We have experience with both simple and complex assembly tasks. For particularly sensitive or valuable furniture, we can offer extra care and precision.

content.whatIsDescription: Household moving involves moving all or parts of a household's belongings from one residence to another. It includes everything from planning, packing and transport to unpacking and possible storage.
content.whyChooseTitle: Why choose us for your household move?
content.whyChooseDescription: We have over 15 years of experience with household moves in Stockholm and have helped thousands of customers with their moves. Our team of professional movers ensures that your move becomes as smooth and secure as possible.
content.pricingTitle: What does a household move cost?
content.pricingDescription: The price of a household move varies depending on factors such as the amount of belongings, the distance between addresses, floor level, access to elevator and any additional services such as packing or storage. A normal move within the same city can cost from about 1,700 SEK and up. To get an exact price, we recommend that you request a free quote tailored to your needs.
content.testimonial: Everything went smoothly and safely from first contact until everything was in place. Highly recommend Flyttella to everyone who wants a worry-free move!
content.bohag2010Description: Household moving 2010 refers to the rules and guidelines established in "Bohag 2010" – an agreement developed by Sweden's Haulage Companies and Swedish Furniture Transporters' Association. The agreement regulates the responsibility between moving companies and customers in household moving, and ensures that the move takes place in a safe and professional manner. It includes among other things insurance, handling of belongings, complaints and payment terms. When you hire a moving company that follows Bohag 2010, you can feel extra secure throughout the entire moving process.
content.boxesDescription: Moving boxes are an important part of a smooth and safe household move. With the right boxes, packing becomes easier and your things are better protected during transport. We offer stable and spacious moving boxes that are adapted for different types of items – from books and porcelain to clothes and electronics. With us, you can borrow moving boxes free of charge for up to 4 weeks when you book your move, which makes the entire process both easier and more cost-effective.
content.bookingTitle: Book moving help in good time
content.bookingDescription: For a smooth and stress-free move, it's important to book moving help in good time. We recommend that you book at least 2-3 weeks in advance to ensure availability and get the moving day that suits you best. We offer flexible booking options and can adapt to your needs. Book today to ensure a professional and reliable moving service.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about household moving

questions.question: What is included in a household move?
questions.answer: A household move includes everything from planning and packing to transport and unpacking. We help you inventory your belongings, pack safely with the right materials, transport everything to your new address and help you unpack and set up the furniture.

questions.question: How far in advance should I book?
questions.answer: We recommend that you book at least 2-3 weeks in advance, especially during peak season (May-September). For smaller moves, we can often help you even with shorter notice, but it depends on our availability.

questions.question: What does a household move cost?
questions.answer: The cost of a household move depends on several factors such as distance, volume, number of movers and any additional services. We always give you a fixed price without hidden costs when we make the quote.

questions.question: Do you have insurance?
questions.answer: Yes, we have full insurance that covers damage that may occur during the move. If something breaks due to our handling, we replace it. It's also important to note that we follow industry standards to minimize the risk of damage.

questions.question: Can you help with packing?
questions.answer: Yes, we offer complete packing help that includes packing, transport and unpacking. We have all the necessary materials and can help you with the entire process from start to finish.
